h19453b8fg9881g4a0cg87a9g84769f5666f0: Looks like you let that rotflower get in your head. My axe'll fix that for you in no time...
h75ddc772g4b9ag45abg86dbg4034a57c9d21: Time you got across the Ebonlake, sir. Nothing more to be done on this side.
h1a976de0geec1g4b95gaf7fgbf98c8ac1199: Time you got across the Ebonlake, madam. Nothing more to be done on this side.
h25292c7fga552g470dg8128ge4c868a9e926: All's settled around here. I reckon it's a good time for you to see the others across the Ebonlake.
hc3e3d1f3g1b15g42b7gab77g0406b2f9b441: Nothing for you here. Cross the Ebonlake to the sergeant. Or drown in it for all I care.
h9f0591ddg97d5g4dbag9f17g96a72761352b: Well? You done mucking about yet?
h5d734c2bg73fag41f4g9442g89cdfe44122b: Get the leather. I ain't wasting more words on you until it's done.
hb81d6e33g712bg46a0gab5eg22477f515096: What a hunt. Maybe you'll find a belt next.
h4b0ba939g9cc2g4bd1gbef7g47a4257b6087: Right, I'll mop up here. You get across the Ebonlake - find Sergeant Thrinn. She'll reward you.
hb895e35agc459g46d9gb105gb7e0975b91ea: What's on the other side of the lake?
h4f7b3542g51a8g4125g9789gd46006c1f8ab: Squad of my kin camping in some ruins. Pack of gnome slaves there too.
hd0607696g48f4g4ed4gb01dg05cc3e867318: We're using 'em for excavation. There's some more ruins Moonrise wants us to make a path to - there's something hidden in 'em. Something the Absolute wants.
h45dc16fag41bag485ag86e8g640c05e514b7: How will I recognise Sergeant Thrinn?
h7e9805c4g2200g4948ga94cg80569a540805: Not too sharp, are you? Look for a duergar with a sour mug and bare feet.
h2df938aegeba4g41bfgb866g425f63ffe456: What does the runaway look like?
h322b995dg8034g4f2dg8992g7f0ba20c6b00: What part of 'not wasting words' didn't penetrate your skull?
h85d3f197gff8eg411ag843fg4fc03469e2a8: She's a deep gnome slave with fancy boots - the only one down here.
h25a9a0cdga341g4563g8b41g4b9532d9388f: Huh. So that's how it's going to be.
h79444413g3d71g4b4eg8dbbg9f55b5f6a049: Right then. Let's get you out of the way.
he6b10965g7b16g4161gbb5cg819a00a7c1b3: Both True Soul an' drow - that slave'd jump off a ledge if she knew who was after her.
h9001082fg76e0g4f78g9b48g552fde704a80: I killed the escapee and the myconids sheltering her.
h48fc13bdg704dg43d3gbbf0g99b001e45def: Good - an'  good riddance. You'd best have proof though - Thrinn will want more than just your word.
h2a9a5172g5395g4b7ag9833gf7c515f0bb73: Not that it's all too smart to question a drow and a True Soul, mind you.
h6a22dd7agb201g41b1g9fb9gb262b2379941: Not that it's all too smart to question a True Soul.
h9ecb8397g6002g4d36g8225g1e9ef457b7c6: I've done as you asked - I have the boots.
h81557ed8ge83fg4e95g9046g2a88c8fd5911: You'll want to take those to Sergeant Thrinn - in the camp.
h6b59ca10g19b5g4e5fgb4fdgeae6311c3036: What's on the other side of the lake?
h97fae9dcgcfa0g4b92g9816g391d81835c99: More like us. And a bunch of gnome slaves.
h0c857803g6181g4fceg8588g872367da98d7: Got them moving rubble. Need to clear a path through to some ruins. The Absolute wants something tucked away in there, and we're to find it.
h0b196b43g2810g4a64g857agf179f2867247: How will I recognise Sergeant Thrinn?
h538dfb89g097fg4c1cg82b4g77b481ce6b8a: Look for a duergar with bare feet and a face like thunder. You can't miss her.
hb477ff94g6491g439dgab62ga1ad89a1b4b6: I'll stay back here, see if I can find some more gnomes. A few more and I reckon I could become a True Soul.
hb36d0544g6705g4336g88e1gb6cf08aa04b7: She's just some deep gnome slave. They all look much the same to me.
hdfef0a4eg4c7eg4b09g930ag7bc8309ecd2b: The boots should give her away.
h66ad3fe4g3526g4dabg86b7g53ce4989dcdd: Could've tried that before. Saved me some time.
haa525b07g34eeg4b34g94ccg52c07aaeb730: You drow can be light on your feet. Must've been why you were sent to join the hunt... Praise the Absolute.
h20ebdc15g71d1g44e3gbbe5g83145adafe5a: You move pretty quietly. Not quietly enough for my liking, though.
h557350dcgfa4dg4affg809dg418de8f24ef6: You're not the gnome I'm hunting...
h07cffcb3gf1a3g46d9gbbb9g13de818c1c75: ... but a slave's a slave. Try not to fight too much. You've no use if you're damaged.
h3358a18fg987ag4c4ag8b59ga7f4237be870: Wasn't expecting one of you drow to join the hunt... Praise the Absolute.
h00f27a8dgc4ccg4cabg8a53g272c6d10d317: ... did something to upset Disciple Z'rell?
he21d1466gd237g41ecgba6eg7ac6141550d9: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
h42046071g9e84g4729g8a71gb8c5a778f85e: Absolute...? I don't know what you mean.
h16e5f0a5g6b20g4d2ag88b0gaac932d7c224: ... huh. Absolute's teachings say that anyone who doesn't bow to him is the enemy.
hf2b5c631gd68dg43a7g828agd054fa6bee6f: Well then, drow or not... I reckon I don't have to answer to you.
hc6f19044g0686g4947gbdcdg068fc3743d02: In fact, if you ain't with the Absolute, I reckon you're more like the enemy.
hd82e525ag4ebag4890g8764g72c2b0cb6dc9: I'm here at the Absolute's bidding. That's all you need to know.
hddaa3df7g1654g48d5gb38dg596b8dc637e4: Especially if you don't have a brand. Ought to see to that... all due respect.
he9f8a172g7a99g4baegbaefgb2272b97572b: I ain't the sort to question a drow... but that was the rottenest lie to ever meet my ears.
h00011aceg6d1bg4430g8e5cg8672138c6d82: And if you ain't who you say you are, I reckon you're fair game.
hb76ed749g0a83g41daga711gb06c583120ed: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
h058f1efcgfce2g443bg9dddgac5ee9b95e53: Show some respect - I am a True Soul.
hf85239b9gecbdg4285g9973g121dacda127b: A True Soul... yes. Should've seen it right away.
h37974340g39ebg4c3eg8370geffe402565fa: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h7c97d6c0g6906g4e90ga381gaafb6a26f9f5: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
he54e11bbgbb0dg42a3gaaa1gdce990816691: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hfef1851fg9eeag4c74gb184gf7f34fc52c64: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
had61d36bg7058g41ebgbd24gdfbfd12865c3: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h732bb4e6ge422g4dceg8dd9g84ab714aaf2b: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h1cf86ffdg427eg43e7g9f7bg1a8d0e8230d0: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
h988ed3abgdc3ag494agaadeg281d075777e4: Show some respect - I am a True Soul.
hd363d245g3d5ag4a40gaf6cg7cf448c901e0: No... something's wrong. You're no True Soul.
hcf024f2fgd12dg48c2gb49cg0278790b999b: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
h11cfe9cbg74a4g4ad9g8c51gafdeab7a72b9: You're not sun-scum. You should know not to make that much noise.
hedeee8bdgda55g4dc5g8ec5g2a11bcc2fe67: Noise gets you eaten down here. Reckon I'll hush you, before something hungry comes along.
he636a026g2e04g4a23ga5cfg43744bce4f50: *His fist grips an axe. On his gnarled, grey skin, you see the Absolute's brand.*
hac2d7839gf5e3g4365gb171g923a448346ce: I could've killed you before you even noticed me, but didn't. Stand down.
hbb8a5207g98c9g44f9gb1dcg30bce4f42360: I follow the Absolute. Take your hand off that weapon.
h909f0b63g030dg4f8ega7abg0c63b11f2596: That so? Maybe you're less useless than you look. Absolute's work needs doing right here.
hd725447aga9c3g43e9gbfffga9c2ec44a64f: No need for violence. I do the Absolute's work.
h1d8ef350g4d04g46f8gaa2bgb8d7096d5a47: Stand down - I'm a follower of the Absolute, just like you.
hc56efdafg11d9g4182g9b76gc80a0524704c: That so? No bad thing to have more of the Absolute's warriors to hand I suppose...
h8c36fe5ag5217g477fg965bg33adc7b424ba: ... might help make shorter work of this mess...
h1095e8c0g7ea2g40e6g921eg305ca2667712: That so? Show me your brand then.
hb5f1e5cag5145g4c00g93a5g0a882b7ce44e: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
h3883a9deg86bfg4624gaab6gcb0fe9fb83ea: No. You'll just have to take my word for it.
h5737812cg4b80g44ccg857fg411eafd286d9: I take nothing I don't want to. Time you stopped sucking air.
hf7b7b86bgb475g43d2g9b68g28206a6e30c2: Well ain't that a crying shame for you...
h6641e6c4gcfa1g4883g88b7ged4bf9d05e24: Huh. Burning those into just anyone now, are they?
h2bb0b2f8geb71g45b9g87cdg631ea1a93afe: No harm. Every army needs grunts to run in and die first. Even the Absolute's.
ha3088bdfg45f3g44a5gab4cgd48e75753ead: But spoil my hunt, and you're dead.
h62c854c2ge93ag44cfgbfe3gf0920694e4f4: Hunting. Slave ran away. Took Sergeant Thrinn's boots.
h0a69b124ga5b9g4b60g9f76gcb3e1a88a9e9: Got to kill the slave and fetch back the leather, or the bosses in Moonrise'll have Thrinn's hide.
h109f2325ged24g41dagbf1cg40c15100d9b0: Help? You don't even know what you'd be up against.
hab0459d5g8e9eg4174gbaceg32945a36ef36: Slave's got herself some protection - hiding up there in a myconid circle.
hea7ed501g2ddfg488fgbaacg0f7afcba60c8: Can't get past those rotflowers. They get in your head, make you see things. Half my squad jumped off a cliff, laughing.
h1720e003gd2cfg4bc4gbe44g1809384408fb: I'll wait here. She'll make a run for it eventually. Then I'll get her.
hf5b4fa87g3dfeg4ffegbbbagc7a16727d87e: I wiped out a myconid circle and a deep gnome sheltering with them.
h2f0fd4acgb65bg4fecgaf80ga82cc4fd2386: The whole lot? Did you find boots on that gnome?
h6b2e7177gd4c7g4067gb527g718dbff80fc7: You'll want to take those boots to Sergeant Thrinn in the camp across the Ebonlake.
h410164c2g0292g4594ga508g5848b927edcc: I'll stay back here, see if I can find some more gnomes. A few more and I reckon I could become a True Soul.
ha3af31e0g8501g480aga9a2g73b974ce5ea9: If you take those boots to Sergeant Thrinn, she'll owe you.
hd9c9adb4gf8e8g46ccg860fgd91f4cdb22cc: Should be with the slave, or whatever's left of her. Find 'em and Sergeant Thrinn'll reward you.
haa606870g12d8g4609ga54bge89c8014bd10: Maybe you'll even be allowed into the Absolute's ranks.
heec83f5dg7551g4d54g854fg736f0a73d6b8: What does this runaway look like?
hc3ba518dga9a0g41abga314gde769f2fbdfa: Deep gnome slave - they all look the same, but this one's got fancy boots.
hf9b49b5bg9ed5g4b2dga6bdg74517359b414: Who's this Sergeant Thrinn you mentioned?
hda102ad0gb275g4078g8fa4ge04cbb804cb5: She's with the rest of our expedition, across the lake. Special mission for the Absolute.
hb9bf2791gb729g4627g8723g72b258a825e7: Show you're worthy of serving the Absolute.
hb4096c7eg2ffdg4c23g819cg5f068004a606: I already took care of the myconids and the gnome they were sheltering.
hf1028bbeg1ee7g4b34g9472g74bff087dc13: Would you really kill someone for a pair of boots?
h3b85e6dbgd981g4631g87deg5f20b7aca01d: Besides, we're talking about a slave.
h4cbdc377g83d0g4bd1g939fg683599f957dc: What do you need slaves for?
hd4a3ab40g5735g4ec5g9aafgf1311f1175f4: Excavation. We've got orders to clear a passage through to some ruins. There's something in there the Absolute wants.
h724a42efg52b9g4348gb5abg45da334d4fbf: Who or what is the Absolute?
h6e0820e1g0b91g425eg8f91g4ad164f6a0b7: My god. Going to turn the world on its head.
h3fe8ce16g1575g49aegbfd3g5b8d274c493e: Anyone who stands against him - stands against us - is gonna wind up a slave or a corpse.
h575100beg5b4dg4849g9f25g3c60c3a80e74: Good. Do well and there might be a reward for you back at camp.
hc2c44e00gddb4g45dcg9099ge00a2aa85d72: Do really well and who knows? Maybe the Absolute'll have space for you in his ranks.
h17bfeda4gff25g4bc0g9e0bg90e89eed5962: But that comes later. Boots first, then you'll get what's coming to you.
ha5219b2eg6f71g43a4gbc8agc7cec313fc40: You're either brave or stupid to be worried about your purse in these parts.
hdf210be8g6053g4a99gbb80g6722a5ebbaef: Get those boots, then we can talk rewards.
h2b2a54e5g0cd9g40d4g8f97g1a14c5160b22: A bleeding heart, are you? Reckon I'll just roast an' eat it.
h968e381ag65b2g4621g97a8g9022425c6a56: Your problems are your own - I'm leaving.
h9b85f43fgc6e8g4e22gb5cdg40bafcd59346: Fine. Suppose I'll just eat you then.
h89828c26gda5dg4490ga8d0ga9c8b02e0369: Told you, hunting. Slave ran away. Took Sergeant Thrinn's boots.
hb5ff8d09ga6d3g4b99g97dfg96e28bfe32c6: What's the terrain ahead like - anything useful you can share?
hbaf2325ag4438g41d6g91fbgb3ffb18046a6: Share? You really are in the wrong place, sun-scum. Try this for useful:
h74bcf27egb02cg41f6gbc31gcf42391bd82b: ... falling down a deep dark hole is the kindest death you'll find in the Underdark.
hfd30008eg9308g49cegad01g1f8823f11687: What has you so cautious. Hook horrors? Basilisks?

h9bf2b9fdgdec3g4542gb7f7gf5139a8bbb3d: Didn't say you could leave, did I? Another step and you'll get a kiss off my axe.
h3caf8fe0g3e30g4ac0ga67dgec3e3a0606fa: I'm on a hunt. Got a runaway slave to kill. Need to fetch back the boots she stole from Sergeant Thrinn.
ha0c268b5gfe37g4e12gb88dg5408b1e3126d: Hold it. You swore an oath to the Absolute. Time to make good on it.
hdf120572g2414g4538g9fb0g8d4c1d3f3d24: I'm already on a mission for the Absolute.
h9979de73g341dg4131gb764gb686d58ee370: Doesn't look like you're showering yourself in glory so far, bumbling around down here.
hc0782ba9gc7efg44e9gac5fg5158f20827f8: Make yourself useful, or maybe there'll be a little culling in the Absolute's ranks...
h9d7f6f57g8c89g4c32g83ccg5aafcd9d9bee: What do you have in mind?
hf0b8d407gb5a5g4cc2g8b30gb13aa9e0fc9c: Backstabbing swine. Absolute'll be stronger once you're dead.
h628122ccg0be6g4fdcg8925gbe2cb0ac377d: Come on then, hookbait. I want to get this over with quick...
he8dd4671g3419g41b8g8c97g6fa56308fd71: Funny. You looked like the sort to beg for mercy.
he582dd42g8ae1g4401g9defgf09a9bf4172f: No matter. You weren't getting any.
h2e8cb531gf39bg4617gb9d2g8792ab395ee3: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
h69d44c44g4b11g4d12ga8ffge8a3c507f533: Stand down. I am a True Soul.
h8ff4d6b7gb895g41f3g89f5g0cb8b6ee4847: ... that's right. You are a True Soul.
h6c42e697g6e2eg4e54gbf1bg804ef3bc57ab: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h115fe4c3g6223g49d3g8613gc0cd4f7bb783: Not like me to overlook one of the Absolute's chosen. Let myself get distracted...
h0a924f0eg9797g4af7ga137gcb734ce3e5a9: Anyway. The hunt's not over yet.
h93de8fedg5dfcg4c0cgb1fag3d4b1ad7c352: Tracking a runaway slave - deep gnome. Stole boots from my sergeant.

h56e7dfebge7feg4019gab94gf471bad5a38e: Good. Can't let some runt make fools o' the Absolute's warriors.

hbed3071bg78cbg4b49g88f7ga5f7a13bfa17: I'll keep watch here. Gnome might make a run for it.
hc3266c3dg70f0g4ef9gbf9dg19252865eb67: I'll see what can be done - but I expect a reward.

h7fca20edgc406g4f19ga8a1g0e94a87c1168: The stolen boots will do nicely as proof. A drow such as yerself could name his prize then, I reckon.
h1aebff85g5920g4b6egb9c4ga6a2529a4d8b: The stolen boots will do nicely as proof. A drow such as yerself could name her prize then, I reckon.
hd42f1710gb357g4f8ag9bb6g781002d8f091: The stolen boots will do nicely as proof. And a True Soul like yerself could name his prize then, I reckon.
ha47e8a32g5168g4412g85dag96c42df2da3d: The stolen boots will do nicely as proof. And a True Soul like yerself could name her prize then, I reckon.
h1e76c3f7g6929g4b2eg9947g506b8dfd4b7f: What does this runaway look like?
h435cbf90gcb4fg4db7g844fg9a598fc6cc29: A deep gnome with boots too good for a slave. That's all I know.
h680c0612g35c5g40c5gbb32g558d29110a84: What are you doing with slaves?
hb5aedbe5gac0eg4414ga492g090e4b07f5b3: Got 'em clearing rubble. We've got orders from Moonrise to reach some old ruins - there's something the Absolute wants, tucked away in there.

h1e8a85c7g1cfag4e34g8b75gfe8196ac920a: Stand down. I am a True Soul.
